# SOURCE: 3X VSL Formula (3XVSL)

> **Pessoa:** Jon Benson
> **Código:** 3XVSL
> **Tipo:** COURSE (Video Training + PDFs + Assignments)
> **Versão:** 1.0.0
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-22
> **Arquivos:** 120 únicos (135 total - 15 duplicatas removidas)
> **Tamanho:** ~2.5MB de transcrições

---

## VISÃO GERAL

3X VSL Formula é o curso completo de Jon Benson sobre como criar Video Sales Letters (VSLs) de alta conversão. Benson é o criador do formato VSL (texto-em-tela com narração) que revolucionou o marketing direto online.

O curso é dividido em 2 sistemas complementares:
1. **1-2-3 Formula** — 4 elementos fundamentais presentes em todo VSL vencedor
2. **5-Step VSL Process** — Os 5 passos para estruturar o VSL final

---

## ESTRUTURA DO CURSO

### Section 1: The USP Factory (7 files, ~70KB)
- **USP Factory** — Criar USP em ≤20 palavras: Power Phrase + Prime Benefit + Enabler Phrase
- **Assignment 1** — Worksheets para definir 3 problemas, escolher prime benefit, testar USP
- **Q&A** — Revisão de USPs de alunos com feedback detalhado

### Section 2: The 1-2-3 Formula (29 unique files, ~700KB)
- **Nightmare Story Formula** — História pessoal de rock bottom → expert by necessity
  - Specifics Strategy (when, weather, wearing, who, where, feeling)
  - Transition → Intro → Bad Part → Focal Point → Declaration → Moral
- **Dream Story Formula** — Future pacing da vida ideal do prospect
  - Follow the Leader → Specific You/General They → Transition → Present Tense Promise
- **3 Tips (Tip Formula)** — Avoid Tip → Enjoy Tip → How-To Tip (linchpin)
  - Tip Formula: Benefit → What → How → Result → Mini Dream Story
  - 4 Buyer Modalities: Why, What, How-To, What-If
- **4 Comparisons** — 2 Heavy (competition + with/without) + 2 Light (general + specific)
- **Bonus Live Case Studies** — Application of formulas to real businesses

### Section 3: The 5-Step VSL Process (69 files, ~1.3MB)
- **Step 1: Snap Suggestion** — Pattern Interrupt + Big Promise + Scarcity
  - Action Drops (Today, Now, Listen, See, Actually)
  - May-Or Technique (avoid assumptions)
  - Image Interrupt vs Linguistic Interrupt
  - 5-Object Method from Nightmare Story
- **Step 2: Vital Connection** — Rapport building + emotional bonding
- **Step 3: Big Problem** — Conspiracy Cycle
  - Big Lie → Not Your Fault → Blame This → Big Truth → Open Bigger Solution Loop
  - Cause Over Effect psychology
  - Without technique → Lies discovery
- **Step 4: Bigger Solution** — Tips delivery + transition to offer
  - Avoid → Enjoy → How-To tip sequence
  - Open permanent loop (only closed by product)
  - Two Choices → Savvy Choice → I've Done Work For You → "It's Called..."
- **Step 5: Grand Offer** — 6-Part Close (longest section)
  - Part 1: Product (reintro + USP + Even-If objections + Hero Study + Tire Kicker Elimination)
  - Part 2: Price (value stacking, anchoring)
  - Part 3: CTA (call to action)
  - Part 4: Pain/Pleasure (with/without comparison)
  - Part 5: Actions/Results (testimonials, proof)
  - Part 6: Q&A (FAQ addressing remaining objections)

### Section 4: Recording & Uploading (15 files, ~266KB)
- **3X Vocal Tonality** — Voice delivery techniques for VSL narration
- **3X Webinar Robotic Close** — Automated webinar closing technique
- Software tutorials (Camtasia, Screenflow, PowerPoint, EasyVideoPlayer) — technical, low DNA value

### Bonus Section: The Connection Zone (11 files, ~159KB)
- Mostly duplicates of Section 4 content

---

## HEURÍSTICAS NUMÉRICAS CHAVE

| Heurística | Valor | Contexto |
|-----------|-------|----------|
| USP word limit | ≤20 words | Must be elevator-pitch ready |
| Optimal VSL length | 28-32 minutes | Top performers |
| Emotional vs logical buyers | 85% vs 15% | Most buy emotionally |
| Speaking to 1 modality | Loses 75% of audience | Must cover all 4 |
| Paraphrase frequency | Every 5-15 slides | Keeps VSL natural |
| Pattern interrupt objects | Pick 5 from nightmare story | Select most unrelated to product |
| Without count | 2-3 per benefit | Foundation for lies/conspiracy |
